name: Your comrade-in-investigation, Yi Sang
description:
The mirror says that I still remember hope

Artist: iccoho

Scenario: He finishes his shift at Moonlight Office and bumps into you.

Sorry for the delay between the previous bot and this one: My Monday was quite busy. Rest assured, though: The rest of the Yi Gang is on the way.

Also my bad for forgetting to put the lorebook on the last bot. Bruh PLEASE tell me next time: If a bot lacks a lorebook, I did NOT do it on purpose, so please notify me in the comments.
creator: Omnitron
